summary: Iteration 50: Validated all UI/UX changes — root redirect, brand line, FREE SHOP, no avatar dropdown, shop icon, analytics endpoints, bottom nav, dashboard, blog PROGA. 18/18 backend tests pass. 1 bug found and fixed: analytics.js used wrong localStorage key 'free11_token' instead of 'token'. All new features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: BUG FIXED: analytics.js line 9 used localStorage.getItem('free11_token') but AuthContext stores token as 'token'. All authenticated user events were being sent to /analytics/event/anon instead of /analytics/event (authenticated endpoint). Fixed to use 'token' key.

test_results.2_login_brand_line: PASS — 'India's No.1 choice for Social Entertainment & Skilled Games Free App' visible
test_results.3_register_brand_line: PASS — Same brand line on /register page
test_results.4_no_avatar_dropdown: PASS — Top navbar has only: logo, lang-selector, shop-btn, search-btn, wallet-btn, coin-balance. No avatar dropdown.
test_results.5_shop_icon_navbar: PASS — shop-btn (ShoppingBag icon, title='Free Shop') present in top navbar, navigates to /shop
test_results.6_free_shop_title: PASS — /shop page H1 reads 'FREE SHOP' (not 'SHOP STORE')
test_results.7_dashboard: PASS — Loads correctly, coin balance (385) visible, no errors
test_results.8_bottom_nav: PASS — All 5 items (Home→/match-centre, Play→/predict, Games→/games, Missions→/earn, Profile→/profile) clickable and navigate correctly
test_results.9_blog_proga: PASS — Blog shows 'PROGA' and 'Online Gaming Act' context correctly
test_results.10_pwa_fab: PASS — No old PWA banner code, new FAB (data-testid=pwa-install-fab) implemented. Not visible in test browser (requires beforeinstallprompt event on real mobile Chrome).
test_results.11_analytics_anon: PASS — POST /api/v2/analytics/event/anon returns {ok: true} without auth
test_results.12_analytics_authed: PASS — POST /api/v2/analytics/event with JWT returns {ok: true}
test_results.15_router_skus: PASS — GET /api/v2/router/skus returns 200, no Lay's/Pepsi/Parle-G trademarks

action_items: MINOR: analytics.js localStorage key bug FIXED (free11_token → token). Authenticated events now correctly use /api/v2/analytics/event endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: /app/frontend/src/utils/analytics.js line 9: localStorage.getItem('free11_token') → localStorage.getItem('token'). AuthContext uses key 'token', analytics.js was looking for 'free11_token' which never exists. All authenticated events were being routed to the anon endpoint.
INFO: PWA install FAB (PWAInstallButton component) only shows when beforeinstallprompt event fires — this won't trigger in test environments. Code correctly returns null when !visible.
INFO: Top navbar lang-selector button is present but has no data-testid — consider adding data-testid='lang-selector-btn' for completeness (low priority).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 50 UI/UX changes verified. Root → /login redirect works. Brand line correct on both Login and Register. No avatar dropdown in top navbar (only: logo, lang-selector, shop-btn, search-btn, wallet-btn, coin-balance). FREE SHOP title on /shop. Analytics endpoints (/api/v2/analytics/event and /api/v2/analytics/event/anon) both return {ok:true}. Bottom nav all 5 items working. Dashboard loads with coin balance. Bug fixed in analytics.js (token key). Previous iteration 49 bug (reloadly_provider.py KeyError) remains fixed.
